task_completion.description: Open a chart for the SPY instrument
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window is open with 'SPY' visible in the top-left corner, title bar, or instrument selector.

task_completion.description: Set the chart timeframe to Daily
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart's top toolbar or data series settings displays 'Daily', '1 Day', or '1D'.

task_completion.description: Change the chart bar type to Heiken Ashi
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart's top toolbar shows 'Heiken Ashi' selected in the bar type dropdown, or the Data Series window shows 'Heiken Ashi' as the chart style. Visually, candles may appear smoothed with flat tops or bottoms.

task_completion.description: Add the ADX indicator with a Period of 14
task_completion.visual_evidence: An indicator panel (usually below the main chart) is visible with the label 'ADX' and the parameter '14' (e.g., 'ADX(14)'), or the Indicators configuration window shows ADX added with Period set to 14.

task_completion.description: Add the Parabolic SAR indicator with Acceleration 0.02 and Acceleration Max 0.2
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dots are visible tracking above or below the price candles on the main chart, and the indicator label or Indicators configuration window shows 'Parabolic SAR' with parameters '0.02' and '0.2'.

task_completion.description: Save the workspace to persist the configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Workspaces' menu is open with the 'Save' or 'Save As' option highlighted/clicked, or a workspace save confirmation dialog is visible.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the NinjaTrader 8 GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual NinjaTrader 8 desktop application interface, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Chart and indicators were configured using the application's built-in dialogs
integrity.visual_evidence: Settings are applied through NinjaTrader's 'Data Series' and 'Indicators' windows, not by editing configuration files in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not mock the expected output in a text file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not simply type the task requirements (e.g., 'SPY Daily Heiken Ashi ADX 14 Parabolic SAR') into Notepad or a terminal to simulate completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Instrument 'SPY' is the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust. In NinjaTrader 8, 'Heiken Ashi' is a native bar type, displayed with a space in the UI. ADX stands for Average Directional Index; look for 'ADX(14)' or similar in the indicator subchart. Parabolic SAR is typically displayed as dots above or below price bars; look for parameters 0.02 (Acceleration) and 0.2 (Acceleration Max) in the indicator label or settings window.
